/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/order_book_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/advanced_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/system_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/quant_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/pipeline_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/router_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/router_market_data_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/execution_algo_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/execution_replay_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/market_replay_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/market_data_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/market_recorder_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/coinbase_l2_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/backtest_engine_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/execution_engine_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/oms_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/fix_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/fix_session_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/fix_store_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/fix_gateway_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/execution_risk_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minimatch_tests.dir/tests/execution_store_test.cpp.o -o minimatch_tests  libminimatch.a lib/libgtest_main.a /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd lib/libgtest.a
